case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: checked 120-210s checkoutservice metrics/traces. latency.p90 dev=+2.7 and trace latency.p99 dev=+4.8 confirm checkoutservice latency as root cause. logs show minor deviations.
